signature: Non-random gaps; completeness far below 100%; worsens over weeks.
property_note: Observation depends on device state and may bias time-aggregated estimands. [EN] additionally if kills are unlogged.
evidence_note: 84% of scheduled executions missing across four devices (Gonzalez-Perez et al. 2022); 54.2% geolocation loss in the 625-participant IAB-SMART study (Bähr et al. 2022); no GPS on 49% of observation days in a 2,394-person Beiwe cohort (Yi et al. 2024, a figure that aggregates technical loss with attrition and adherence).

failure_mode: Offline-first sync loss / token expiry / duplicate re-sync
signature: Missing or duplicated records; silent truncation.
property_note: Integrity and idempotency of the record.
evidence_note: Sync and export failures reported but unquantified (Slade et al. 2025); [E] checksums and deduplication rarely described in methods sections.

property_note: Instrumental drift; traceability to a common time reference at an uncertainty suited to the measurand.
evidence_note: Tens of ppm, of order seconds per day (Tirado-Andrés et al. 2019); BLE application-layer synchronization error exceeding 25 ms in 28% of sessions, maximum 183 ms (Yan et al. 2017).

signature: Physiological gaps indistinguishable from true signal absence.
property_note: Gap provenance unrecorded; observation selectively absent.
evidence_note: No systematic reporting of field disconnection and packet-loss rates was identified.

signature: Missing sessions, confounded with technical loss.
property_note: Operator and protocol effects; missing-not-at-random risk.
evidence_note: Mean EMA compliance 79.2% across 477 articles, with 43% of studies below the conventional 80% threshold (Wrzus & Neubauer 2023); permission and authorization failures reported by Slade et al. 2025.

signature: Discontinuity not marked in the data.
property_note: Measurement performance may change; the change is not recorded and prior verification is not transferable across it.
evidence_note: A January 2019 Google Play policy change cut call- and text-log collection mid-recruitment in RADAR-MDD (Matcham et al. 2022); [E] protocols frequently changed without being versioned.

property_note: Severs the provenance chain from a published number back to the act of measurement — the record-fidelity analogue of, but distinct from, metrological traceability.
evidence_note: Compare datasheets for datasets (Gebru et al. 2021).
Under-reported for wearables with no standardized characterization protocol (Cosoli et al. 2024); over 70% of surveyed light-dosimetry studies reported no sensor calibration (Spitschan et al. 2022).
